summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of My Profile page feature. All core functionality working correctly including profile redirect, login, header dropdown navigation, profile tabs (Profile, Orders, Addresses), and address CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED - Login/Register uses mock.js, Order history is static data, Addresses use localStorage. No backend integration yet.
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
Profile page correctly redirects to /auth when not logged in
All tabs (Profile, Orders, Addresses) work correctly with proper animations
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from mock.js and localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Profile page feature is fully functional. All tests passed: (1) Profile redirect to /auth when not logged in, (2) Login with demo credentials, (3) Header dropdown shows 'My Profile' link for logged-in users, (4) Profile tab shows user info (name, email), (5) Orders tab shows 3 mock orders with different statuses (Delivered, Shipped, Processing), (6) Addresses tab shows saved addresses with CRUD operations (Add, Delete, Set Default), (7) Logout functionality works from profile page. Note: All data is MOCKED - no backend integration.

tests_executed.test: Profile page redirect when not logged in

tests_executed.details: Shows user name, My Profile link, and Logout button
Shows 3 mock orders with items, prices, and status badges
Shows default address with proper styling
Address removed, empty state shown when no addresses
Clears localStorage, redirects to home page

mocked_apis.note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - No backend integration
